---
title: Describing data
author:
  - Norah Jones
  - Bill Gates
  - Luis Francisco Gomez
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    embeded-resources: true
---

```{r}
#| label: load-libraries-r
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(skimr)
```

# Introduction

Pending

# Import

```{r}
#| message: false
weekly_store <- read_csv(file = "../000_data/003_data_set_chapter-3.csv")
```

# Transform data

```{r}
weekly_store <- weekly_store |> 
  mutate(
    storeNum = factor(x = storeNum, ordered = FALSE),
    Year     = factor(x = Year, levels = 1:2, ordered = TRUE),
    Week     = factor(x = Week, levels = 1:52, ordered = TRUE),
    p1prom   = as.logical(p1prom),
    p2prom   = as.logical(p2prom)
  )
```

# Summary

```{r}
weekly_store |> 
  skim()
```

# Visualization
